title: Junior Business Development Manager at Hubtown

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Hubtown
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
